Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

I

Inventory - Klasse in model.items
Represents a player's inventory that stores items and their quantities.
Inventory() - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.Inventory
 
INVENTORY - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GameFrame
Identifier for the inventory screen.
InventoryScreen - Klasse in view.pausemenu
InventoryScreen represents the graphical user interface for displaying the player's inventory inside the pause menu.
InventoryScreen(Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.pausemenu.InventoryScreen
Creates the inventory screen UI and binds it to the given game instance.
isGameRunning() - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Marks whether a game session is currently running.
isOn() - Methode in Klasse view.utils.ToggleButton
Returns whether this toggle button is currently enabled.
isSelected() - Methode in Klasse view.utils.ArrowPanel
Returns whether this arrow is currently selected.
Item - Klasse in model.items
Base class for all items in the game.
Item(String, String, String, Itemtype) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.Item
Creates a new item with the specified properties.
items - Variable in Klasse model.Game
A map of all available items in the game, indexed by name.
ItemsLoader - Klasse in controller
Utility class responsible for loading item data from a serialized file.
Itemtype - Enum-Klasse in model.items
Represents the different categories of items available in the game.
